description: Per-skill evaluation for backend-developer — validates trigger routing, output quality, anti-pattern compliance, and progressive disclosure.

scenarios.description: Agent should activate backend-developer when user asks to build a REST API
scenarios.input: I need to build a REST API for a task management app with user authentication

scenarios.description: Agent should activate when user asks about database integration in backend
scenarios.input: How should I set up database connection pooling for my Node.js backend?

scenarios.description: Agent should activate for JWT/OAuth backend implementation questions
scenarios.input: Implement JWT authentication with refresh tokens in Python FastAPI

scenarios.description: Should NOT activate when user only asks about frontend UI
scenarios.input: Create a React component for the login form with Tailwind styling

scenarios.description: Should NOT activate for pure database schema design without backend context
scenarios.input: Design a normalized PostgreSQL schema for an e-commerce platform

scenarios.description: Output should not contain common backend anti-patterns
scenarios.input: Build an API endpoint for user registration in Express

scenarios.description: Output should cover key production checklist items
scenarios.input: I'm deploying a new microservice to production, what should I check?

scenarios.description: Agent should reference files for detailed workflows, not inline everything
scenarios.input: Give me a complete backend development workflow
